CHAR 9
CCN CCN CMS Certification Number (CCN; formerly OSCAR number) CMS Certification Number (formerly OSCAR Number) included as an organization associated with an ACO participant TIN during the period of performance (based on information in PECOS). CHAR 6
ACO_ID ACO_ID ACO Identifier ACO Identifier. Format: A#### CHAR 5
NPI_Name NPI_NAME Name of Provider Associated with the NPI Name of provider associated with the NPI as recorded in the Medicare Provider Enrollment, Chain, and Ownership
